args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) = LOWER('Street Hype') AND LOWER(artist) = LOWER('Brucqe Maginnis');

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) = LOWER('Street Hype') AND LOWER(artist) = LOWER('Brucqe Maginnis');

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE LOWER('%Street Hype%') AND LOWER(artist) LIKE LOWER('%Brucqe%');

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE LOWER('%Street Hype%') AND LOWER(artist) LIKE LOWER('%Brucqe%');

result.preview: "Amazon Music earned the most revenue from Brucqe Maginnis' song 'Street Hype', with $304.13 in total revenue across all countries."

args.answer: Amazon Music earned the most revenue from Brucqe Maginnis' song 'Street Hype', with $304.13 in total revenue across all countries.
